SELECT h3GetFaces(index) AS faces FROM h3_indexes;
SELECT h3GetFaces(0) AS faces; -- Testing with the minimum valid index value
SELECT h3GetFaces(18446744073709551615) AS faces; -- Testing with the maximum UInt64 value
SELECT h3GetFaces(599686042433355775) AS faces UNION SELECT h3GetFaces(1234567890123456789) AS faces;
SELECT h3GetFaces(index) AS faces FROM h3_indexes WHERE index > 0;
SELECT h3GetFaces(index) AS faces FROM h3_indexes WHERE index IN (SELECT index FROM h3_indexes WHERE index < 100);
SELECT h3GetFaces(index) AS faces FROM (SELECT index FROM h3_indexes WHERE index BETWEEN 599686042433355775 AND 599686042433355780);
INSERT INTO h3_faces SELECT faces[1] FROM h3_indexes;
SELECT h3GetFaces(index) AS faces FROM h3_indexes JOIN h3_faces ON h3_faces.face = h3GetFaces(h3_indexes.index)[1];
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT h3GetFaces(index) AS faces FROM h3_indexes) AS face_counts;
SELECT index, h3GetFaces(index) AS faces FROM h3_indexes WHERE index IN (SELECT index FROM h3_indexes WHERE index % 2 = 0);
WITH (SELECT max(index) FROM h3_indexes) AS max_index SELECT h3GetFaces(max_index) AS faces;
